scripts.build: bun run --filter @llm-bridge/contracts build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/runtime-events build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/runtime-core build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/bridge-codecs build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/client build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/extension build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/example-app build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @llm-bridge/bridge-codecs build && bun run --filter @llm-bridge/client build && bun run --workspaces --sequential typecheck
